name: ruby-json
title: ruby-json
description:
JSON library for Ruby
This library implements the JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) specification in
Ruby, allowing the developer to easily convert data between Ruby and JSON. You
can think of it as a low fat alternative to XML, if you want to store data to
disk or transmit it over a network rather than use a verbose markup language.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-json because JSON library for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-json as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-json with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-json --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
